gbdt_ensembling.description: Strategies for training and ensembling GBDT models (XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost) via averaging or folding.

feature_engineering_tabular.description: Mathematical transformations, scaling, interactions, and column transformations for tabular datasets.

categorical_encoding.description: Encoders for mapping categorical variables into numeric values (Target encoding, Frequency encoding, etc.).

cv_strategies.description: Cross-validation partitioning strategies for tabular datasets.

imbalance_handling.description: Techniques for managing class imbalance in tabular classification (SMOTE, class weighting).

hyperparam_search.description: Hyperparameter optimization strategies like Optuna and Random Search.

tabular_deep_learning.description: Neural networks designed specifically for tabular data (MLPs, Attention architectures).

blending_stacking.description: Meta-ensembling techniques including rank blending and stacking algorithms.

missing_value_imputation.description: Methods to fill in missing continuous or categorical values.

outlier_handling.description: Techniques to detect, clip, or filter outlying observations.

factorization_machines.description: Factorization Machines models for capturing pairwise feature interactions in tabular data.

interaction_aware_gbdt.description: Techniques that automatically construct feature interactions and train gradient boosting models on the augmented feature set.
